metadata.name: DPMhalo
metadata.summary: The Descriptive Parametric Model for gaseous halos

functions.name: dpmhalo.gaussian.volume_weight
documentation: This function returns the analytical solution to sqrt(2/Pi)/sigma exp(-(x-mu)^2/(2*sigma^2))/10^x, i.e. a Gaussian distribution times volume, parametrized by 1/10^x where x is log density and mu and sigma are in log density.
This function returns the analytical solution to a log normal distribution: 1/(x*sigma*sqrt(2*pi)) exp(-(ln(x)-mu)**2/(2*sigma**2))

variables.name: dpmhalo.scripts.run_smhm.GalType
documentation: Assume general SMHM, can do '_sf' and '_q' as well.

modules.name: dpmhalo.modelparams
documentation: return the 31 DPM model parameters, for our favored models.

functions.name: dpmhalo.smhm.Behroozi2019_UNIVERSEMACHINE_return_lM200c
documentation: This is the replacement for the Behroozi2013 code below and includes returning error ranges.

functions.name: dpmhalo.smhm.Behroozi2013_return_mhalo
documentation: This is a very rudimentary code and has been replaced.
